hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: We honor the stories you share. This policy explains what we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.

items.title: What we collect
items.description: Contact details, order info, story details you provide, and basic device data.

items.title: Why we use it
items.description: To craft your song, deliver it securely, provide support, and improve the experience.

items.title: How we share it
items.description: With trusted providers (payment, hosting, email) and when required by law.

items.title: Your choices
items.description: Request access, correction, or deletion and opt out of marketing anytime.

sections.title: Overview
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy explains how ApolloSong ("we", "us", and "our") collects, uses, and protects information when you visit our website, request a custom song, or contact our team.
By using our services, you agree to the practices described here. If you do not agree, please do not use the site or submit personal information.

sections.title: Information we collect
paragraphs: We collect information you provide directly and information that is generated through your use of our services. We only collect what we need to deliver and improve ApolloSong.

subsections.title: Information you provide
paragraphs: When you place an order or contact us, you may provide details such as your name, email address, recipient name, occasion, preferred style, scripture references, and other story details needed to craft your song.
bullets: Contact details (name, email, phone if provided)
Order details (recipient name, occasion, timeline preferences)
Creative inputs (story notes, themes, messages, scripture references)
Communication content (support inquiries, feedback, revision notes)

subsections.title: Order and payment information
paragraphs: Payments are processed by third-party payment providers. We receive confirmation of payment, order identifiers, and limited billing details needed for recordkeeping. We do not store full payment card numbers on our servers.
bullets: Transaction IDs and payment status
Billing name and postal code (if provided)
Invoice and tax-related records

subsections.title: Usage and device data
paragraphs: When you visit our site, we may automatically collect basic information about your device and usage to keep the site secure and perform analytics.
bullets: IP address, browser type, and operating system
Pages viewed and time spent on the site
Referring URLs and approximate location

subsections.title: Sensitive information
paragraphs: Your story may include sensitive personal details. Please avoid sharing unnecessary sensitive information (such as government IDs, financial account numbers, or health records). If you include sensitive details, we will treat them with heightened care and use them only for fulfilling your order.

sections.title: How we use information
paragraphs: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve ApolloSong.
bullets: Create your custom song and deliver it to you securely
Communicate about your order, revisions, and support requests
Improve our creative process, website performance, and user experience
Detect and prevent fraud, abuse, or security incidents
Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms

sections.title: Legal bases (EEA/UK)
paragraphs: If you are located in the European Economic Area or the United Kingdom, we process your personal information under the following legal bases:
bullets: Contractual necessity (to fulfill your order)
Legitimate interests (to improve services and protect our platform)
Consent (for optional marketing communications)
Legal obligations (tax, accounting, and compliance requirements)

sections.title: How we share information
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal information. We share information only as needed to operate ApolloSong.

subsections.title: Service providers
paragraphs: We use trusted vendors for payments, hosting, analytics, and communication. These providers may access information only to perform services on our behalf and are required to protect it.
bullets: Payment processing
Email delivery and customer support
Website hosting and analytics

subsections.title: Legal and safety
paragraphs: We may disclose information if required by law, regulation, subpoena, or legal process, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of ApolloSong, our customers, or the public.

subsections.title: Business transfers
paragraphs: If we are involved in a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction. We will notify you of any material changes.

sections.title: Cookies and analytics
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember preferences, measure performance, and improve the site.
bullets: Essential cookies for core site functionality
Preference cookies to remember language or settings
Analytics cookies to understand site usage trends

sections.title: Data retention
paragraphs: We keep personal information only as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.
bullets: Order records are retained for accounting and customer support purposes
Creative briefs and communications are kept to fulfill your order and handle revisions
Analytics data is retained in aggregate form when possible

sections.title: Security
paragraphs: We use administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your information. This includes access controls, encrypted connections, and least-privilege access for team members.
No system can be 100% secure. Please use a strong email password and contact us immediately if you believe your information has been compromised.

sections.title: Your rights and choices
paragraphs: Depending on where you live, you may have rights regarding your personal information.
bullets: Access, correct, or delete your personal information
Request a copy of your data (data portability)
Object to or restrict certain processing
Opt out of marketing emails by using the unsubscribe link or contacting us

sections.title: International transfers
paragraphs: ApolloSong may operate across borders. Your information may be processed in countries other than your own. When we transfer data, we use appropriate safeguards to protect it.

sections.title: Children's privacy
paragraphs: ApolloSong is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us personal information, please contact us so we can delete it.

sections.title: Third-party links
paragraphs: Our website may link to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites, and we encourage you to review their policies.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make material changes, we will post an updated version and revise the "Last updated" date.

sections.title: Contact us
paragraphs: If you have questions about this policy or want to exercise your privacy rights, please reach out using the contact details below.

contactCard.title: Privacy questions or requests
contactCard.description: We respond to privacy inquiries and data requests as quickly as possible.
contactCard.note: If you are requesting data on someone else's behalf, include proof of authority.
